list-grid-search-sort-filter: status badge and action state behavior
auth-mfa-redirects: error, snackbar, or guidance message validation
notifications-emails-sideeffects: trigger condition for toast, snackbar, or banner
non-trigger behavior when conditions are not met
background job or sync reflection in the UI
audit trail or reflected downstream state when relevant
onboarding-account-setup: entry into setup or onboarding flow
downstream reflection in account or feature behavior
multi-actor-role-flows: admin vs user visibility and execution
accessibility-keyboard-aria: screen-reader label or accessible name presence
ARIA or visible label alignment when relevant
modal, popup, or drawer focus trapping and return focus
responsive-mobile-adaptive: desktop vs tablet vs mobile layout behavior
responsive visibility of key actions or columns
drawer, modal, or filter behavior on small screens
state persistence across resize or orientation change when relevant
cross-browser-compatibility: browser-specific download, upload, or date control behavior
concurrency-multi-user: same record changed by two users
duplicate click or double submit protection
locking or conflict message behavior when relevant
performance-large-data: heavy list or grid load behavior
degraded but usable behavior under load
pagination, filter, or search usability with large data
api-db-verification: DB persistence and reflected state verification
